INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SHADOW_IRONCLAD.banter: Dost thou wisheth to gather moss?

INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SHADOW_IRONCLAD.descri:
The last Ironclad, who embraced demonic will.
Armed and armored with the earth itself.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SHADOW_IRONCLAD.goldMo: Precious metal. Thy shalt put it to good use.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SHADOW_IRONCLAD.title: The Tectonic
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SHADOW_REGENT.banter.a: I'm no waiter, and this isn't the galley.
